content.problemStatement:
There is a communication channel with N+1N+1N+1 stations (numbered 000 through NNN). Station 000 wants to send a message to station NNN. You may install memory disks at up to KKK of the stations 1,2,…,N−11, 2, \ldots, N-11,2,…,N−1. Let's denote the increasing sequence of stations at which memory disks are installed by (v1,v2,…,vk)(v_1, v_2, \ldots, v_k)(v1​,v2​,…,vk​), where k≤Kk \le Kk≤K is the number of such stations, and let v0=0v_0 = 0v0​=0 and vk+1=Nv_{k+1} = Nvk+1​=N. In stations other than v0,v1,…,vk+1v_0, v_1, \ldots, v_{k+1}v0​,v1​,…,vk+1​, it is only possible to send the message forward without storing it for later.

For each iii (0≤i<N0 \le i \lt N0≤i<N), if the message is currently at the station iii, this station can send the message to the station i+1i + 1i+1. This transfer takes one second regardless of its success or failure. With probability pip_ipi​, the transfer succeeds and the message reaches the station i+1i + 1i+1. Otherwise, the transfer fails and the message instantly goes back to the station vjv_jvj​, where jjj is the unique index such that vj≤i<vj+1v_j \le i \lt v_{j+1}vj​≤i<vj+1​ (if i=vji = v_ji=vj​, the message simply stays in the station vjv_jvj​), and this station has to send it forward again.

Your task is to choose stations where memory disks should be installed, in such a way that the expected value of time needed for the message to reach station NNN is the smallest possible. Find this smallest expected time.

You are not given the probabilities directly. Instead, you are given a non-increasing integer sequence F0,F1,…,FNF_0, F_1, \ldots, F_NF0​,F1​,…,FN​. For each valid iii, pi=Fi+1/Fip_i = F_{i+1} / F_ipi​=Fi+1​/Fi​.
constraints: the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 10510^5105

`Explanation**Example case 1:** The probabilities of success are p0=p1=1/2p_0 = p_1 = 1/2p0​=p1​=1/2. If no memory disks are installed, the expected amount of time the message needs to reach station 222 is 666 seconds.

If a memory disk is installed at station 111, the expected time is 444 seconds (222 seconds to transfer from station 000 to station 111 and further 222 seconds to transfer from station 111 to station 222).
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and KKK.
The second line contains N+1N + 1N+1 space-separated integers F0,F1,…,FNF_0, F_1, \ldots, F_NF0​,F1​,…,FN​.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one real number — the smallest possible expected time needed for the message to reach station NNN. Your answer will be considered correct if its absolute or relative error does not exceed 10−610^{-6}10−6.
